farfield farm.description: A small farmhouse stands beside fenced fields and grazing sheep.
farfield farm.name: Farfield Farm

old ruins.description: A weathered stone stands alone in the silver grass.
old ruins.name: Old Ruins

petal meadow.description: The silver grass grows thinner here, giving way to wildflowers and open meadow.
petal meadow.name: Petal Meadow

quietbrook.description: A narrow brook flows quietly through the tall grass.
quietbrook.name: Quietbrook

silvergrass plain.description: The wind moves softly through tall silver grass, bending it like waves across an endless sea. A narrow dirt path cuts through the quiet field, leading toward distant hills. The air is calm, and the world feels wide and still.
silvergrass plain.name: Silvergrass Plain
